User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user account information and preferences.

profilePic.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

CallLog.title: Call Log
CallLog.description: Stores history of calls processed by AI agents.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns the agent/call.

caller.description: The phone number or caller identifier.

agent.description: The name of the agent handled the call.

duration.description: The duration of the call (e.g., '1:30' or '45s').

cost.description: The computed cost of the call in USD.

outcome.description: The ultimate resolution or outcome of the call.

transcript.description: Full text transcript of the call conversation.

sentimentAnalysis.description: Detailed explanation of the sentiment evaluation.

/users/{userId}.description: Individual user profiles keyed by their Firebase Auth UID.

/calls/{callId}.description: Call records containing details, transcripts, sentiment, and cost.
